center.name: 阿苏艾省
center.summary: 阿苏艾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Black-winged ground dove、紫颏毛腿蜂鸟、紫巾山蜂鸟等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: saturatior is found in the Andes of southwestern Colombia south to Ecuador's Azuay Province. The black-winged ground dove inhabits páramo in Colombia and Ecuador and puna in Peru, Bolivia, Chile, and Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: inornatus: western slope of Ecuador's Andes from southwestern Chimborazo Province south to Azuay Province The chestnut-capped brushfinch inhabits the understory of a variety of humid to wet forest types in the upper tropical and lower temperate zones. In northern Central America these include pine-oak forest and cloudforest at elevations between . In Costa Rica in addition to wet subtropical forest it occurs in mature secondary forest; in elevation it ranges there between . In Panama it mostly occurs above . In Venezuela it ranges between in the Andes and between in the Coastal Range. In Colombia it favors forest with a bamboo understory; it ranges in elevation between . In Ecuador it mostly occurs between and in Peru between and locally to

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The song is a series of double-notes repeated for about a minute. The bird inhabits the undergrowth of humid forest between 700 and 1250 metres above sea-level on the Andean slope in El Oro Province, Guayas Province and Cañar Province and undoubtedly in the intervening Azuay Province.Krabbe, N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across central Colombia east to the Magdalena Valley and Cundinamarca Department, and south on the Pacific slope into western Ecuador as far as Azuay Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Currently, the red-faced parrot has only been found in Ecuador and Peru, mostly between the eastern Andes mountain range of southern Ecuador and the northwest region of Peru. More specifically, they inhabit mild forests of the provinces of Azuay, Loja and Morona-Santiago and the Piura department in Peru.{{Cite journal |last1=Toyne |first1=E

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes of western Ecuador south to Azuay Province and in the coastal Cordillera de Mache. The red-faced spinetail mostly inhabits lower to mid-elevation subtropical montane forest and woodlands including mature secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes from Nariño Department in extreme southwestern Colombia south through Ecuador as far as Azuay Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in favorable habitats from southern Columbia to the mountains of Azuay Province, especially around the volcanoes of Cotacachi, Pichincha, Antisana, Iliniza, and Cotopaxi.del Hoyo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: arcosae, the Andes from southern Ecuador's Azuay Province into extreme northern Peru's departments of Piura and Cajamarca The glowing puffleg inhabits a variety of fairly open landscapes
